name: Doug's Kickoff Barbeque Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients in a large bowl and mix well until fully incorporated.
2. Taste the mixture using the tip of your index finger. Adjust the flavor by adding one tablespoon of Tabasco sauce for extra heat if desired.
3. Apply the sauce generously to ribs, pork, beef, or chicken before cooking. This recipe serves 20 people.
